name: podman
description: Manage containers, pods, and images with Podman

name: --connection
-c
options.description: Connection to use for remote Podman service

name: --help
-h
options.description: Help for podman

options.name: --identity
options.description: Path to SSH identity file, (CONTAINER_SSHKEY)

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Log messages above specified level (trace, debug, info, warn, warning, error, fatal, panic) (default 'warn')

options.name: --out
options.description: Send output (stdout) from podman to a file

options.name: --ssh
options.description: Define the ssh mode (default 'golang')

options.name: --storage-opt
options.description: Used to pass an option to the storage driver

options.name: --url
options.description: URL to access Podman service (CONTAINER_HOST)

name: --version
-v
options.description: Version for podman

subcommands.name: attach
subcommands.description: Attach to a running container

options.name: --detach-keys
options.description: Override the key sequence for detaching a container

options.name: --no-stdin
options.description: Do not attach STDIN

options.name: --sig-proxy
options.description: Proxy all received signals to the process (default true)

subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: Build an image using instructions from Containerfiles

args.name: strings
args.description: Images to consider as cache sources

options.name: --disable-content-trust
options.description: Skip image verification (default true)

name: -f
--file
options.description: Name of the Dockerfile (Default is 'PATH/Dockerfile')

options.name: --iidfile
options.description: Write the image ID to the file

options.name: --isolation
options.description: Container isolation technology

options.name: --label
options.description: Set metadata for an image

options.name: --network
options.description: Set the networking mode for the RUN instructions during build (default "default")

options.name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not use cache when building the image

name: -o
--output
options.description: Output destination (format: type=local,dest=path)

options.name: --platform
options.description: Set platform if server is multi-platform capable

options.name: --progress
options.description: Set type of progress output (auto, plain, tty). Use plain to show container output

options.name: --pull
options.description: Always attempt to pull a newer version of the image

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Suppress the build output and print image ID on success

options.name: --secret
options.description: Secret file to expose to the build (only if BuildKit enabled): id=mysecret,src=/local/secret

options.name: --squash
options.description: Squash newly built layers into a single new layer

options.name: --ssh
options.description: SSH agent socket or keys to expose to the build (only if BuildKit enabled) (format: default|<id>[=<socket>|<key>[,<key>]])

name: -t
--tag
options.description: Name and optionally a tag in the 'name:tag' format

options.name: --target
options.description: Set the target build stage to build

subcommands.name: commit
subcommands.description: Create new image based on the changed container

name: -a
--author
options.description: Author (e.g., "John Hannibal Smith <hannibal@a-team.com>")

name: -c
--change
options.description: Apply Dockerfile instruction to the created image

name: -m
--message
options.description: Commit message

name: -p
--pause
options.description: Pause container during commit (default true)

subcommands.name: cp
subcommands.description: Copy files/folders between a container and the local filesystem

name: -a
--archive
options.description: Archive mode (copy all uid/gid information)

name: -L
--follow-link
options.description: Always follow symbol link in SRC_PATH

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Create but do not start a container

options.name: --add-host
options.description: Add a custom host-to-IP mapping (host:ip)

name: -a
--attach
options.description: Attach to STDIN, STDOUT or STDERR

options.name: --blkio-weight
options.description: Block IO (relative weight), between 10 and 1000, or 0 to disable (default 0)

options.name: --blkio-weight-device
options.description: Block IO weight (relative device weight) (default [])

options.name: --cap-add
options.description: Add Linux capabilities

options.name: --cap-drop
options.description: Drop Linux capabilities

options.name: --cgroup-parent
options.description: Optional parent cgroup for the container

options.name: --cgroupns
options.description: Cgroup namespace to use (host|private)

options.name: --cidfile
options.description: Write the container ID to the file

options.name: --cpu-period
options.description: Limit CPU CFS (Completely Fair Scheduler) period

options.name: --cpu-quota
options.description: Limit CPU CFS (Completely Fair Scheduler) quota

options.name: --cpu-rt-period
options.description: Limit CPU real-time period in microseconds

options.name: --cpu-rt-runtime
options.description: Limit CPU real-time runtime in microseconds

name: -c
--cpu-shares
options.description: CPU shares (relative weight)

options.name: --cpus
options.description: Number of CPUs

options.name: --cpuset-cpus
options.description: CPUs in which to allow execution (0-3, 0,1)

options.name: --cpuset-mems
options.description: MEMs in which to allow execution (0-3, 0,1)

options.name: --device
options.description: Add a host device to the container

options.name: --device-cgroup-rule
options.description: Add a rule to the cgroup allowed devices list

options.name: --device-read-bps
options.description: Limit read rate (bytes per second) from a device (default [])

options.name: --device-read-iops
options.description: Limit read rate (IO per second) from a device (default [])

options.name: --device-write-bps
options.description: Limit write rate (bytes per second) to a device (default [])

options.name: --device-write-iops
options.description: Limit write rate (IO per second) to a device (default [])

options.name: --disable-content-trust
options.description: Skip image verification (default true)

options.name: --dns
options.description: Set custom DNS servers

options.name: --dns-option
options.description: Set DNS options

options.name: --dns-search
options.description: Set custom DNS search domains

options.name: --domainname
options.description: Container NIS domain name

options.name: --entrypoint
options.description: Overwrite the default ENTRYPOINT of the image

name: -e
--env
options.description: Set environment variables

options.name: --env-file
options.description: Read in a file of environment variables

options.name: --expose
options.description: Expose a port or a range of ports

options.name: --gpus
options.description: GPU devices to add to the container ('all' to pass all GPUs)

options.name: --group-add
options.description: Add additional groups to join

options.name: --health-cmd
options.description: Command to run to check health

options.name: --health-interval
options.description: Time between running the check (ms|s|m|h) (default 0s)

options.name: --health-retries
options.description: Consecutive failures needed to report unhealthy

options.name: --health-start-period
options.description: Start period for the container to initialize before starting health-retries countdown (ms|s|m|h) (default 0s)

options.name: --health-timeout
options.description: Maximum time to allow one check to run (ms|s|m|h) (default 0s)

options.name: --help
options.description: Print usage

name: -h
--hostname
options.description: Container host name

options.name: --init
options.description: Run an init inside the container that forwards signals and reaps processes

name: -i
--interactive
options.description: Keep STDIN open even if not attached

options.name: --ip6
options.description: IPv6 address (e.g., 2001:db8::33)

options.name: --ipc
options.description: IPC mode to use

options.name: --isolation
options.description: Container isolation technology

options.name: --kernel-memory
options.description: Kernel memory limit

name: -l
--label
options.description: Set meta data on a container

options.name: --label-file
options.description: Read in a line delimited file of labels

options.name: --link
options.description: Add link to another container

options.name: --link-local-ip
options.description: Container IPv4/IPv6 link-local addresses

options.name: --log-driver
options.description: Logging driver for the container

options.name: --log-opt
options.description: Log driver options

options.name: --mac-address
options.description: Container MAC address (e.g., 92:d0:c6:0a:29:33)

name: -m
--memory
options.description: Memory limit

options.name: --memory-reservation
options.description: Memory soft limit

options.name: --memory-swap
options.description: Swap limit equal to memory plus swap: '-1' to enable unlimited swap

options.name: --memory-swappiness
options.description: Tune container memory swappiness (0 to 100) (default -1)

options.name: --mount
options.description: Attach a filesystem mount to the container

options.name: --name
options.description: Assign a name to the container

options.name: --network
options.description: Connect a container to a network

options.name: --network-alias
options.description: Add network-scoped alias for the container

options.name: --no-healthcheck
options.description: Disable any container-specified HEALTHCHECK

options.name: --oom-kill-disable
options.description: Disable OOM Killer

options.name: --oom-score-adj
options.description: Tune host's OOM preferences (-1000 to 1000)

options.name: --pid
options.description: PID namespace to use

options.name: --pids-limit
options.description: Tune container pids limit (set -1 for unlimited)

options.name: --platform
options.description: Set platform if server is multi-platform capable

options.name: --privileged
options.description: Give extended privileges to this container

name: -p
--publish
options.description: Publish a container's port(s) to the host

name: -P
--publish-all
options.description: Publish all exposed ports to random ports

options.name: --pull
options.description: Pull image before creating ("always"|"missing"|"never") (default "missing")

options.name: --read-only
options.description: Mount the container's root filesystem as read only

options.name: --restart
options.description: Restart policy to apply when a container exits (default "no")

options.name: --rm
options.description: Automatically remove the container when it exits

options.name: --runtime
options.description: Runtime to use for this container

options.name: --security-opt
options.description: Security Options

options.name: --shm-size
options.description: Size of /dev/shm

options.name: --stop-signal
options.description: Signal to stop a container (default "SIGTERM")

options.name: --stop-timeout
options.description: Timeout (in seconds) to stop a container

options.name: --storage-opt
options.description: Storage driver options for the container

options.name: --sysctl
options.description: Sysctl options (default map[])

options.name: --tmpfs
options.description: Mount a tmpfs directory

name: -t
--tty
options.description: Allocate a pseudo-TTY

options.name: --ulimit
options.description: Ulimit options (default [])

name: -u
--user
options.description: Username or UID (format: <name|uid>[:<group|gid>])

options.name: --userns
options.description: User namespace to use

options.name: --uts
options.description: UTS namespace to use

name: -v
--volume
options.description: Bind mount a volume

options.name: --volume-driver
options.description: Optional volume driver for the container

options.name: --volumes-from
options.description: Mount volumes from the specified container(s)

name: -w
--workdir
options.description: Working directory inside the container

--follow
options.description: Follow log output

--tail

--timestamps
options.description: Show timestamps

options.name: --until
options.description: Show logs before a timestamp (e.g. 2013-01-02T13:23:37Z) or relative (e.g. 42m for 42 minutes)

subcommands.description: Pause all processes within one or more containers

default-cgroupns-mode option on the daemon (default)
